name: Mobile Injection Screen
instruction: Create a React Native (Expo) screen for GLP-1 injection logging. Use Expo Router. Show: 1) A form with drug selector (dropdown: 'Ozempic', 'Wegovy', 'Mounjaro', 'Saxenda'), dose input (numeric), injection site selector (abdomen/thigh/arm with simple buttons), date picker, optional memo. 2) Below the form, show recent injection history (last 10) fetched from GET /api/injections. 3) Submit button calls POST /api/injection. Use Nativewind for styling (className prop). Import api functions using wrappedFetch pattern from '../src/lib/api'. Use local useState for form state.

name: Mobile Weight Screen
instruction: Create a React Native (Expo) screen for weight logging and tracking. Use Expo Router. Show: 1) A simple weight input form (numeric, kg) with date picker and optional memo. 2) Stats cards: current weight, change from start, progress to goal (%). 3) Recent weight log list (last 10 entries). Fetch from GET /api/weights?range=30d, submit via POST /api/weight. Use Nativewind for styling (className prop). Import api functions using wrappedFetch pattern from '../src/lib/api'. Use local useState for form state.
